reasoning: Your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. This ride will directly address those issues using over-unders to enhance your ability to manage and clear lactate effectively. Improving in this area is crucial for your upcoming Alpine Loop event, especially highlighting your performance on the Sundance → Cascade Springs climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets of 7 minutes: 4 minutes at 209-218W (88-92% FTP) to build endurance, followed by 3 minutes at 242-256W (102-108% FTP) to push lactate threshold, with 3 minutes easy spinning in between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
